title: Astro Bot
description: A charming 3D platformer starring the mascot robot of PlayStation, packed with creative levels and clever use of the DualSense controller.

title: Demon's Souls
description: A stunning remake of FromSoftware's 2009 cult classic, rebuilt from the ground up with breathtaking visuals and uncompromising difficulty.

title: Ratchet & Clank: Rift Apart
description: A dimension-hopping adventure that showcases the PS5 hardware with near-instantaneous load times, ray-traced visuals and DualSense haptics.

title: Final Fantasy XVI
description: A dark, action-driven entry in the iconic JRPG series set in the war-torn world of Valisthea, featuring spectacular Eikon battles.

title: Returnal
description: A punishing third-person bullet-hell roguelite in which an astronaut is trapped in a time loop on an alien planet that reshapes itself with every death.

title: Forspoken
description: A young woman from New York is transported to a magical world called Athia where she must master elemental magic to survive.

title: Halo Infinite
description: Master Chief returns in a spiritual reboot of the Halo saga, featuring an open world campaign on the ring-world Zeta Halo and a free-to-play multiplayer mode.

title: Forza Horizon 5
description: The open-world racing series heads to Mexico in its most expansive and visually stunning entry yet, with hundreds of cars and dynamic seasonal events.

title: Hi-Fi Rush
description: A surprise Xbox exclusive in which a wannabe rock star fights corporate robots in a vibrant cel-shaded world where everything moves to the beat.

title: Starfield
description: Bethesda's first new IP in 25 years is a space exploration RPG spanning over 1,000 planets, with deep character customisation and ship-building systems.

title: Redfall
description: An open-world co-op shooter set in a Massachusetts island town overrun by vampires, blending Arkane's immersive-sim DNA with looter-shooter mechanics.

title: Sea of Thieves
description: A shared-world pirate adventure that grows richer with every update, rewarding crews who sail, plunder, and forge legends together on the open seas.

title: The Legend of Zelda: Tears of the Kingdom
description: Link explores a shattered Hyrule and the sky islands above it, using the Ultrahand and Fuse abilities to solve puzzles and build incredible contraptions.

title: Metroid Dread
description: Samus Aran returns in a tense 2D side-scrolling adventure on Planet ZDR, hunted by near-invincible EMMI robots in a beautifully rendered alien world.

title: Pikmin 4
description: The beloved real-time strategy series reaches new heights with refined controls, a charming dog companion called Oatchi, and sprawling new environments to explore.

title: Bayonetta 3
description: The Umbra Witch faces interdimensional threats in this wild action sequel, introducing a new multiverse story and the ability to control giant demon summons.

title: Neon White
description: A blazingly fast card-based first-person shooter in which assassins race through heavenly levels, discarding weapon cards as movement tools to shave milliseconds off runs.

title: Shadowrun Returns
description: A cyberpunk tactical RPG set in a near-future Seattle where magic and technology collide, based on the classic pen-and-paper roleplaying game.

title: Chorus
description: A dark space combat shooter following ex-cult pilot Nara and her sentient starship Forsaken as they seek redemption and take on a galaxy-spanning cult.

title: Ghostwire: Tokyo
description: A supernatural action game set in a near-empty Tokyo where the player unravels a mysterious vanishing using elemental abilities and spirit powers.
